title: Python Fundamentals
description: Master Python basics including variables, control flow, functions, and file handling. Build a solid foundation for backend development and data science.

title: HTML, CSS & JavaScript Bootcamp
description: Learn to build responsive web pages from scratch using modern HTML5, CSS3, and vanilla JavaScript with DOM manipulation.

title: React.js Frontend Development
description: Build modern single-page applications with React. Covers components, hooks, state management, routing, and API integration.

title: Data Analysis with Python
description: Perform exploratory data analysis, data cleaning, and visualization using Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib on real-world datasets.

title: Statistics for Data Science
description: Core statistical concepts including probability, distributions, hypothesis testing, and regression analysis for data-driven decision making.

title: Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn
description: Implement supervised and unsupervised ML algorithms including linear regression, decision trees, random forests, and k-means clustering.

title: Deep Learning & Neural Networks
description: Build neural networks from scratch and with TensorFlow/Keras. Cover CNNs, RNNs, transfer learning, and model optimization.

title: Natural Language Processing
description: Process and analyze text data with NLP techniques including tokenization, sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, and transformer models.

title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials
description: Understand AWS cloud services, pricing models, security fundamentals, and architecture best practices for the cloud practitioner certification.

title: Docker & Kubernetes Mastery
description: Containerize applications with Docker and orchestrate deployments with Kubernetes. Covers images, pods, services, and Helm charts.

title: Linux System Administration
description: Master Linux command line, file systems, process management, networking, shell scripting, and system security fundamentals.

title: Network Security & Ethical Hacking
description: Learn network security principles, vulnerability assessment, penetration testing, and ethical hacking methodologies using industry tools.

title: SQL & Database Design
description: Design relational databases, write complex SQL queries, normalize data, and work with PostgreSQL and MySQL in production environments.

title: NoSQL with MongoDB & Redis
description: Explore document-based and key-value databases. Build applications with MongoDB for flexible schemas and Redis for caching and real-time data.

title: UI/UX Design Principles
description: Learn user-centered design, wireframing, prototyping with Figma, accessibility standards, and design system creation.

title: FastAPI Backend Development
description: Build high-performance REST APIs with FastAPI. Covers Pydantic validation, async endpoints, middleware, authentication, and OpenAPI docs.

title: MLOps & Model Deployment
description: Deploy ML models to production with MLOps best practices. Covers model serving, monitoring, CI/CD for ML, and cloud deployment strategies.
